experiment: S28 W1 #24 — cache-hit replay after idea_hash tier fix
fixes_applied: Bug 1: tier appended to idea_hash composition (sha256(protocol|vertical|intent|size|horizon|tier))

results.notes: Idle is single-tier (basic only); tier-keying does not affect it.
Drop from 0.981 -> 0.962 reflects the 5 pro spec_change calls now correctly missing against the basic cache. Still well above 0.70 prior; pricing band unchanged.

Drop from 0.984 -> 0.982. The 20 pro spec_change swaps now miss, but base-idea spray dominates the volume so the headline ratio barely moves. Brief expected a larger drop because we assumed prior measurement was tier=basic-only collision; in fact the basic-tier paraphrase collapse is the real driver and remains intact.

summary: Tier-keying produces a small but correct correction in active-low (1.9pp) and active-high (0.2pp). Idle is unaffected. The S27 'inflation' was much smaller than the brief expected because the streams are basic-tier dominant and the basic-tier semantic-hash collapse was already accurate.
